titleStmt.title: SII 8.324: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 324. (A.R. No. 49 of 1903). ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE FIRST PRAKARA OF THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimai yiṟ ciṟanta maṇimuṭi cūṭi minavar nilaikeṭa villavar kulaitara Eṉaimannava
riḻiyaluṟ ṟuḻitara tikkaṉaittu n=ta n cakkara naṭātti vijaiyaābhiṣe kañceytu virasiṅndāsa nattu Avanimuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟirun=ta ruḷiya korājake
caripanma rāna tiripuvanacakkra vattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻade vaṟku yāṇṭu 4 10 4Āvatu kaṅkaikoṇṭacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu tirumuṉaippāṭik kiḻānmurnā
ṭṭuk kaṇiccapākkat tūromukku camain=ta kaṇiccapākkamuṭai yān Aṭainakkanum kaṇiccapākkamuṭaiyān cūṟṟi taḷipperumānum kaṇiccapākkamu
ṭai yān Arai yan [janivā]rakaṟpakamum nāraṇamumāna kayilācapukaḻanum kaṇiccapākkamuṭai yān tirumāl puttanum kaṇiccapākka
muṭai yān cuntaran kulattāṉum maṇṇainalluḻān Iruṇikkikovum Uḷḷiṭṭa Ūrom kaliyukacaṇṭeśvarade vaṟku nā
ṅkaḷ Innāṭṭu Ātirā jamaṅkalliyapurattut tiruviraṭṭāṉamuṭaiyār vākicanmaṭattukku maṭappuṟamāka viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamā
vatu kiḻkaḻaniyil Eṅkaḷurt talaippāṭakattil rājentra coḻappereri kīḻkarai kkuk kiḻakku vaṭapāṟkellai Innāṭṭu pa
ṉaippākkat tellaikkut teṟkuṅ kiḻpāṟkellai mitinipākkat tellaikku meṟkun tenpāṟkellai Uṟṟaṭat
tuṟavumāka Innānkellaiin naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam kuḻi 2 1000 Ikkuḻi Iraṇṭāyiramum Aḷantukoḷḷuvatākavum Em
milicainta vilaipporuḷ kācu 8 Ikkācu Eṭṭuṅ koṇṭa paricāvatu yāṇṭu 4 10 3Āvatu kaṭamaiyil taṭṭi
ṟaik kuṭalāka vāṅkik kaṭamaikku vaittu Innilam vākicanmaṭattukku viṟṟukkuṭuttom kaṇiccaipākkat tūrom .
Ivvākīcanmaṭattukku paṉaippākkat tūrom viṭṭa nilam Araiveliyum . Itu panma hāyeśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 8.324 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
